title: Phase 1: core (S0 spike, schema, parse, synthesizer, sidecar, transcript-writer, migrate)
description: Build cc-recall core per spec §15.1: S0 transcript-format spike (DONE), record/schema.ts (zod), transcript/parse.ts, record/synthesizer.ts, surfaces/sidecar.ts (node:sqlite), surfaces/transcript-writer.ts, migrate/home-path.ts. Test on 7 pieces-dev sessions. Deps: zod + node:sqlite (no native compile).
notes:
S0 spike done. Transcript record types: ai-title{sessionId,aiTitle} (appended repeatedly - take LAST), user{cwd,gitBranch,timestamp,sessionId,message:{role,content:array of {type:text|tool_result|...}},promptSource,isSidechain,slug,uuid,parentUuid}, assistant{message.content: thinking|text|tool_use}, last-prompt{lastPrompt,leafUuid}, system{subtype}, attachment, file-history-snapshot, queue-operation. Genuine prompts: content[0].type==text & promptSource!=sdk. started/ended_at = min/max .timestamp (NOT mtime). Lineage: first user msg often a handoff; last-prompt captures handoff-out request. Corpus DIVERGED: joeblack old-home now 43 sessions/6 dirs (was 11557/33) - Phase 0 largely already migrated.
Foundation built + green (pnpm check + 5 tests pass): src/types.ts (raw transcript domain types + guards), src/record/schema.ts (zod RecallRecord, SCHEMA_VERSION=1), src/transcript/parse.ts (JSONL reader, metadata derivation, genuine-prompt detection) + parse.test.ts. Deps added: zod@4, eslint-import-resolver-typescript. Fixed latent scaffold lint-config gaps the empty stubs had masked: useNamingConvention snake_case for serialization keys, import-x/no-unresolved+no-relative-parent off (tsc authoritative; @-alias breaks runtime dist), disableTypeChecked for .mjs, ops/** ignored, _-prefix unused ok, todo-tag off, vitest pool:forks. NEXT (blocked on Joe): synthesizer LLM strategy decision before building synthesizer/sidecar/transcript-writer/migrate.
Synthesizer DONE + green (11 tests). src/record/synthesizer.ts: heuristic baseline (files_touched from edit-tool tool_use, top_tools, handoff_in via first-msg handoff marker, handoff_out via last-prompt request→last substantial assistant text) + injectable LlmRunner (default=runClaudeHeadless via spawn claude -p over stdin, 60s timeout) + zod-validated enrichment merge + graceful fallback to heuristic on any LLM failure. Decision recorded: claude -p headless + heuristic fallback. REMAINING Phase 1 core: surfaces/sidecar.ts (node:sqlite + FTS), surfaces/transcript-writer.ts (backup+idempotent-by-hash+integrity-reparse+revert — safety critical), migrate/home-path.ts, then CLI/index wiring + /recall:doctor (G0).
Sidecar + transcript-writer + migrate/home-path DONE + green (22 tests, full pnpm check). surfaces/sidecar.ts: node:sqlite, sessions table + FTS5 (title/summary/facets/phrases/files), upsert(replace)/get/getSourceHash/search(bm25,sanitized tokens)/stats; rebuildable. surfaces/transcript-writer.ts: backup→idempotent-by-source-hash (cc-recall ai-title marker carries hash)→atomic temp+rename→integrity re-parse→auto-restore; + revert. migrate/home-path.ts: slug rename + collision merge (UUID-unique) + boundary-guarded (joeblackwaslike safe) + cwd rewrite (path-boundary regex) + dry-run default + manifest + revert. index.ts re-exports public API. REMAINING Phase 1: bin/cc-recall.ts CLI (commander) wiring all commands + /recall:doctor (G0 claude-mem verify). Then phases 2-7.
CLI + engine DONE + green (26 tests, full pnpm check, end-to-end smoke-tested on real 1137-line pieces-dev transcript: index→skip(idempotent)→positive FTS search→revert round-trip, transcript stayed valid JSONL). src/engine.ts: indexSession (hash-skip before synth), backfill (idempotent/resumable), listTranscripts, coverage. bin/cc-recall.ts (commander): index/backfill/migrate/search/revert/doctor. Deps: commander@15. /recall:doctor reports sidecar OK + coverage% + claude-mem G0 probe (currently NOT reachable→surface ③ stays disabled; full G0 round-trip lands with surfaces/claude-mem.ts). Build-order item #1 (core) COMPLETE. Remaining: SessionEnd hook→CLI wiring (phase4), claude-mem+native-memory surfaces (phase5, after G0), lineage/match, commands/*.md plugin slash cmds, U0 upstream issue.

title: Phase 5: secondary surfaces (claude-mem G0 + native-memory)
description: Secondary surfaces, gated + degrade-gracefully. FINDING: claude-mem has no CLI; worker HTTP on :37777 (CLAUDE_MEM_WORKER_PORT), SQLite ~/.claude-mem/claude-mem.db, auto-observes every session via own hooks. Read endpoints stable (/api/health,/api/readiness,/api/search). WRITE (observation_add to /v1/memories) is server-beta-only + duplicates auto-observations => cc-recall deliberately does NOT write. surfaces/claude-mem.ts: health+search+verifyClaudeMemG0 (injectable fetch). doctor now runs REAL G0 (was bogus CLI probe) => PASS live v13.6.0. surfaces/native-memory.ts: writeFrontPage (top-N from sidecar). New CLI cmd: frontpage. sidecar.top(n). 32 tests. Smoke-tested live.
close_reason: claude-mem read-only coexistence + real G0 gate (no fragile writes; write API is server-beta-only and would duplicate auto-observations); native-memory front page built. All green, smoke-tested live (G0 PASS).

title: Phase 4: SessionEnd forward-capture hook
description: Wire hooks/session-end.mjs to forward-capture each ended session via cc-recall index. Non-blocking (detached background spawn), never fails the session, logs to baseDir/logs/session-end.log. Env knobs: CC_RECALL_LLM=0 (heuristic), CC_RECALL_DB, CC_RECALL_BASE_DIR. hooks.json already registers it. Verified end-to-end: hook returns {continue:true} instantly, detached child injects recall-record + upserts sidecar ~500ms later.
close_reason: Implemented + smoke-tested end-to-end: non-blocking detached forward capture, env-configurable, logs to baseDir/logs. dist build required at runtime (packaging = phase 6).

title: EPIC: implement cc-recall core per design spec
description: Fill the scaffolded src/ stubs and ship cc-recall per docs/superpowers/specs/2026-06-14-cc-recall-design.md. Rollout (§15): 1) core (S0 spike + G0 verify + synthesizer + sidecar + transcript-writer + migrate/home-path) tested on the 8 pieces-dev sessions, file U0 upstream issue; 2) Phase 0 home-path normalization (--dry-run+backup, 11557 joeblack→joe sessions); 3) trial backfill (~15k); 4) SessionEnd forward capture; 5) secondary surfaces (claude-mem upsert + native memory) after G0; 6) packaging; 7) adoption measurement. Structure done in cc-recall-3i1. Create per-phase sub-tasks as you go.

title: cc-recall: README overhaul (create-ts-project Phase D)
description: Run agent-skills:github-readme-overhaul: badges (CI/license), hero, features, quickstart, config reference, contributing. Currently no README. Link to /docs once Docusaurus (cc-recall-ul9) exists.

title: cc-recall: add Claude Code plugin structure
description: Add .claude-plugin/plugin.json + commands/ hooks/ skills/ scaffolding per the design spec (/recall:* commands, SessionEnd + UserPromptSubmit hooks, optional MCP server). Tap agent-skills:developing-claude-code-plugins / plugin-dev. This is implementation scaffolding — pairs with building cc-recall core. Tooling already in place (cc-recall-6ka).
close_reason: Plugin structure scaffolded + validated (a8b63ff). Manifest, /recall:* commands, SessionEnd+UserPromptSubmit hooks, using-cc-recall skill, src/+bin/ skeleton. claude plugin validate passed; typecheck/Biome/ESLint clean.

title: cc-recall: build Docusaurus docs site (create-ts-project Phase C)
description: Run create-ts-project Phase C (docusaurus-docs-builder): Docusaurus 3 + docusaurus-plugin-llms. Deferred until code exists + remote up.

title: cc-recall: create GitHub remote + enable live CI
description: Create github.com/joeblackwaslike/cc-recall (private); confirm ci.yml/release-please run live. Deferred until meaningful code exists.

title: Bootstrap cc-recall with create-ts-project tooling
description: Run the create-ts-project retrofit (skill: create-ts-project:update) on cc-recall to add the standard TS scaffolding: linters/formatter (Biome), test setup (Vitest), tsconfig strict, Claude Code/agent infra, GitHub Actions CI, doc templates, devcontainer, etc. — only applies what's missing/outdated. NOTE (Joe): the scaffolder is picky about the target dir not being nested; may need to move repo contents to a temp folder, run it so paths resolve at the right root, then move everything back. cc-recall is currently pre-implementation TS (ESM, Node 22+, matches pieces-dev conventions) so this aligns it.
close_reason: Tooling bootstrap done on branch chore/create-ts-project-bootstrap (commit 7dc0152): Biome, ESLint, tsconfig, test runner, Husky, CI/CodeQL/release-please/labeler/stale, devcontainer, .vscode, justfile, Serena, MIT. src/ skeleton + plugin structure + README/docs intentionally deferred to follow-up tasks.

title: Post corroborating comment to claude-mem#2793 (CLAUDE_CODE_PATH trigger)
description: Drafted comment adding our trigger (invalid CLAUDE_CODE_PATH -> generator fail-loop -> 20GB freelist bloat) to thedotmack/claude-mem#2793. Outward action, needs go-ahead. Maps to cc-recall 'U0 upstream issue task'.

title: Env cleanup: stale dirs + openclaw CLI version skew
description: 1) rm -rf ~/.claude/projects/-Users-joeblack--claude-mem-observer-sessions (5.3GB stale, old account). 2) rm -rf ~/github/joeblackwaslike/claude-mem-watchdog (empty husk after move to cc-recall/ops/watchdog). 3) Align openclaw CLI: PATH has homebrew 2026.5.7 but gateway runs nvm 2026.6.1 — upgrade/remove homebrew so 'openclaw' matches gateway. 4) Optional: remove inert ~/.openclaw/extensions/claude-mem-watchdog dir.

title: Decide + merge ops/claude-mem-watchdog branch into main
description: Merge BOTH feature branches into main: (1) ops/claude-mem-watchdog (watchdog, commit 29a433a) and (2) chore/create-ts-project-bootstrap (TS tooling, commit 7dc0152). Reconcile docs first. NOTE: .beads is git-tracked and causes cross-branch checkout churn — consider gitignoring it (shared Dolt server is the source of truth) as part of merging.
close_reason: Both feature branches merged to main (13b8473 watchdog, c0bdc3c bootstrap). Beads handled: installed bd sync hooks + made them durable via tracked .husky/<hook> files (794ddfb); root cause (init doesn't install hooks + husky-regen wipes .husky/_) fixed in the beads-operations skill (agent-skills c78ffa8) + global CLAUDE.md. Decided AGAINST gitignoring .beads (bd intends JSONL tracked).

title: Reconcile watchdog repo to parked bridge state
description: Repo's install.sh/uninstall.sh/README.md/AGENTS.md still describe the abandoned internal-hook bridge (handler.mjs + hooks.internal). lib.sh hardcodes OPENCLAW=/opt/homebrew/bin/openclaw (stale 2026.5.7). The plugin/ dir (new approach) is uncommitted. Reconcile once bridge approach is settled.

title: Revive OpenClaw approval bridge (inbound_claim plugin) — build + prove on --dev
description: Parked 'A'. Build the claim plugin that returns {handled:true} so the agent never sees approve/deny. Gotchas: definePluginEntry is on 'openclaw/plugin-sdk/core' (not /plugin-sdk); plain-object export loads but never wires register(); plugin dir needs package.json with openclaw.extensions:['./index.js'] + openclaw.plugin.json with configSchema; plugins.allow is an EXCLUSIVE allowlist (do not set it). Develop/test against an isolated 'openclaw --dev' profile, NOT the live gateway. Source seed: ops/watchdog/openclaw/plugin/ (uncommitted).
